❯ fix the bug in auth.js

● Let me look at the auth file first.

● Read 1 file (ctrl+o to expand)

● I see the issue. The token check is missing a null guard. Let me fix it.

● Edit(src/auth.js)
  ⎿  Updated src/auth.js with 3 changes
       12  -  if (token.valid) {
       12  +  if (token && token.valid) {

● Fixed. The problem was that `token` could be null when the session expires, causing a TypeError. Added a null guard.

✻ Brewed for 15s
